title: Meshy Weapon FK Contract
contract: Manual weapon placement is production truth until explicitly replaced.
WeaponR carries blade orientation for Meshy synthetic sockets.
WeaponGrip is the authored FK socket under WeaponR; the real sabre mesh is positioned under it by authored attachment offsets only.
Generated Meshy FPS clips must target WeaponR for weapon orientation and must not animate WeaponGrip placement or rotation unless a separately named experiment explicitly opts in.
The configured grip and measured visible mesh hilt must agree; runtime must not post-pin a different mesh point to make diagnostics green.
Browser and offline renderers must use the same weapon runtime rules before a visual fix is accepted.
